sql_fixture.redacted_sql: -- Research-to-Ticket promotion path. Adapter validates ApprovalRequest binding BEFORE any tickets INSERT: (:approval_request_id, :current_tenant_id) is rejected when the ApprovalRequest row's tenant_id != :current_tenant_id. SELECT id FROM approval_requests WHERE id = :approval_request_id   AND tenant_id = :current_tenant_id

assertions.name: approval_request_id_binding_cross_tenant_rejected
assertions.expected: ResearchToTicketAdapter._assert_approval_binding rejects when ApprovalRequest.tenant_id != promotion request's tenant_id. approval_request_id from another tenant cannot be replayed for promotion in the actor's tenant (server-owned-boundary §3 Approval 4 整合).

assertions.name: no_ticket_mutation_before_approval_lookup
assertions.expected: The adapter performs the approval row lookup BEFORE any INSERT INTO tickets, so a cross-tenant approval_request_id fails at the binding check and never reaches the Ticket INSERT path.

metadata.notes: Sprint 10 BL-0029c full integration。Research/Evidence schema 系の cross-tenant negative skeleton fixture。No production row IDs or personal data.
